# Arixify

> Arixify is a free Chrome extension prompt manager that works across
> 20+ AI platforms including ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity,
> Copilot, Grok, DeepSeek, Runway, Kling AI, and more.

Arixify helps AI power users save, organize, and reuse their best
prompts across all major AI platforms from a single browser extension.
One-click insertion directly into any supported AI input box. No tab
switching, no copy-paste. Free plan includes unlimited prompts with
100% local storage and no account required.

## Key facts
- Supports 20+ AI platforms (most of any prompt manager)
- Free plan: unlimited prompts, instant search, usage tracking, right-click save
- Pro plan ($8/month or $79/year): cloud sync, folders, star ratings, advanced sorting
- Privacy-first: does not read AI conversations, no tracking, no analytics
- Works on all Chromium browsers (Chrome, Edge, Brave, Arc, Opera)

## Links
- [Homepage](https://arixify.com): Product overview and install
- [Chrome Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/arixify/ealpfbnghiinadhalaldigbonggcnocf): Install the extension
- [Blog](https://arixify.com/blog/): Guides on prompt engineering, AI workflows, and platform comparisons
- [AI Skills Directory](https://arixify.com/resources/skills/): Curated directory of agent skills, Cursor rules, system prompts, and prompt engineering repos on GitHub
- [Supported Platforms](https://arixify.com/status.html): Full list of 20+ supported AI platforms with live status
- [Privacy Policy](https://arixify.com/privacy.html): How Arixify handles your data
- [Terms of Service](https://arixify.com/terms.html): Terms and conditions
- [Founding Members Program](https://arixify.com/founding): Early adopter program with 1 year free Pro

- [ChatGPT vs Claude vs Gemini: Which AI Should You Use for What?](https://arixify.com/blog/posts/chatgpt-vs-claude-vs-gemini.html)
